case_title: SHARON BISPO VS. TROY TAZBAZ et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT SHARON BISPO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S/CROSS COMPLAINANTS TROY TAZBAZ AND BRYN FOWLER ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANTS PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BISPO, SHARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAZBAZ, TROY FOWLER, BRYNN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BISPO, SHARON RECOVER FROM APPELLANT TAZBAZ, TROY FOWLER, BRYNN $2,632.12 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,632.12, EACH SIDE PREVAILED IN PART. THERE WERE NO COSTS AWARDED TO EITHER SIDE. THE CROSS COMPLAINANT'S DAMAGES WERE SUBTRACTED FROM DAMAGES OWED TO THE PLAINTIFF. SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY APPELLANT TAZBAZ, TROY

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn
Appeal as to judgment on plaintiffs claim entered 6-28-18 against appellant/defendant.

Sharon Bispo, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf
Randy Cox carpet cleaner testifies on behalf of Respondent having been placed under oath.

Troy Tazbaz and Brynn Bowler, Appellants testify on their own behalf

Appellant examined by Court.
Respondent examined by Court

The following documentary evidence is introduced on behalf of Respondent:
Photos on Ms. Bispo's phone are shown to the Court.
Respondent Group Exhibit 1: several receipts, letter from Mr. Cox, invoices are admitted.

The following documentary evidence is introduced on behalf of Appellant:

Group Exhibit A: marked as respondents' exhibits photos of units, e-mails, text messages, cost bills, photos on cell phone shown to the court, all admitted into evidence

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. All exhibits returned to respective parties.

Judge Pro Tem: Greg Groeneveld; Clerk: D. Feinberg; Not Reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-29-2018 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-29-2018 Judgment Entered
